prompt: A traditional Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print depicting a lone traveler descending a steep mountain path toward a calm valley below. Strong black outlines, flat areas of unshaded color, muted indigo, beige, and earthy tones. Stylized clouds and flowing landscape, diagonal composition guiding the eye downward. Textured paper and visible woodblock grain. No modern elements, no text, no labels
tradition_approach: Used flat colors, bold outlines, diagonal composition, and stylized landscapes to reflect ukiyo-e grammar while mapping descent through terrain to optimization steps
